text: Slow-cooked pork prepared in copper pots, seasoned with local herbs and served with handmade tortillas. Crispy on the outside, tender inside — a regional favorite with bold flavor
Corn tortillas filled with cheese or meat, bathed in red salsa and topped with potatoes, carrots, and lettuce. A colorful, satisfying dish often served during local festivities.
Soft, slightly sweet bread made with milk and eggs, often enjoyed with coffee or hot chocolate. A comforting treat found in Maravatío’s bakeries and morning markets.
